---
title: "Checklist"
css: styles/checklist.css
---

Complete these before you start the cohort.

::: {.checklist-highlight}

### Step 0: Join the Discord

Everything starts here. Join the Discord to connect with the cohort, ask questions, share progress, and get help.

[Join Discord](https://discord.gg/QZuBvfcj){.cta-button-checklist}

:::

::: {.checklist-highlight}

### Step 1: Set up the following accounts

These accounts are required for the cohort. Set them up now so you're ready to go from day one.

| Platform | Link |
|----------|------|
| **Hugging Face** | [huggingface.co](https://huggingface.co/) |
| **GitHub** | [github.com](https://github.com/) |
| **BubblSpace** | [timecapsule.bubblspace.com](https://timecapsule.bubblspace.com/) — our product; sign in for now |
| **Google Colab** (free) | [colab.research.google.com](https://colab.research.google.com/) |

:::

## Step 2: Follow the cohort lead

Follow on all platforms; we follow back.

| Platform | Link |
|----------|------|
| **Hugging Face** | [@TheFireHacker](https://huggingface.co/TheFireHacker) |
| **GitHub** | [@thefirehacker](https://github.com/thefirehacker) |
| **X (Twitter)** | [@thefirehacker](https://x.com/thefirehacker) |
| **LinkedIn** | [linkedin.com/in/thefirehacker](https://www.linkedin.com/in/thefirehacker/) |
